problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins may resolve How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
